component.name: ContentReader
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "getcontent" end sub
sub getcontent() content = CreateObject("roSGNode", "ContentNode") readInternet = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") readInternet.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") readInternet.initClientCertificates() readInternet.setUrl(m.top.uri)
response = readInternet.GetToString() print "FEED URL: "; m.top.uri print "FEED RESPONSE: "; response json = ParseJson(response)
if json <> invalid and type(json) = "roArray" for each item in json child = content.CreateChild("ContentNode") child.title = item.title child.url = item.url if item.streamformat <> invalid child.streamFormat = item.streamformat else if item.streamFormat <> invalid child.streamFormat = item.streamFormat else child.streamFormat = "mp4" end if
if item.contenttype <> invalid child.contentType = item.contenttype else child.contentType = "movie" end if
if item.hdposterurl <> invalid child.hdPosterUrl = item.hdposterurl else if item.hdPosterUrl <> invalid child.hdPosterUrl = item.hdPosterUrl end if
if item.sdposterurl <> invalid child.sdPosterUrl = item.sdposterurl else if item.sdPosterUrl <> invalid child.sdPosterUrl = item.sdPosterUrl end if next end if
m.top.content = content end sub
